MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN OPPOS TO MOITON TO QUASH FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAYLOR, REED

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS ROBERT MOONEY, TIMOTHY WILCOX, AMPLUS CO LLC, AND MOONEY MONEY FUND INC.'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS FOR LACK OF PERSONAL JURISDICTION OR, ALTERNATIVELY, TO DISMISS OR STAY ACTION FOR INCOVENIENT FORUM IS GRANTED AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO IDENTIFY SUFFICIENT CONTACTS TO SUPPORT SPECIFIC JURISDICTION. (WALTER V. SUPERIOR COURT (1986) 178 CAL.APP.3D 677; STONE V. TEXAS (1999) 76 CAL.APP.4TH 1043). calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-22-2012 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Otion To Quiash Service Of Summons For Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction
Off Calendar Feb-15-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Lisa A. Jacobs, Esq., of Shartsis Friese, Tel. 415.421.6500, appearing for Defendant and moving party.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS ROBERT MOONEY, TIMOTHY WILCOX, AMPLUS CO LLC, and MOONEY MONEY FUND INC.'s Motion To Quash Service Of Summons For Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction Or, Alternatively, To Dismiss Or Stay Action For Incovenient Forum is Granted as to all defendants. Plaintiff fails to identify sufficient contacts to support specific jurisdiction. (Walter v. Superior Court (1986) 178 Cal.App.3d 677; Stone v. Texas (1999) 76 Cal.App.4th 1043). Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported

Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons
Off Calendar Jan-05-2012 Off Calendar

Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons
Off Calendar Dec-21-2011 Continued To Jan-13-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
